title: onobrychis caput-galli f. depressa
intro: Onobrychis caput-galli f. depressa is a lesser-known variety of sainfoin, a perennial legume native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis caput-galli f. depressa include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating menstrual cramps, making it a natural remedy for women's health. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried to be used in herbal capsules or tinctures, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
